title: Undefile
description: An addon to Defile that helps clean up the mess that mod makes.
body:
# Undefile
Undefile is a mod that adds a way to clean up the mess created by doctor4t's [Defile](https://modrinth.com/mod/defile) mod. Craft a Sun Staff and start clearing away the gunk with the ~~power~~ magic of the sun.

## How to Clear the Ink
Craft a Sun Staff from 2 blaze rods, 2 diamonds, and a sun effigy (added by Defile).

![A 3x3 grid showing 2 molten rods, 2 blue diamonds, and a strange star-like trinket](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/186f328bd2929d607fe3400bc94d9b623ffd69d8.png)

The staff has two states. In its default state, use it to throw orbs of sunlight at ink to clear small areas away at a time. This can be done at a rapid pace.

![A staff being used to throw magic orbs at ink to remove the ink](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jzbQ3nDh/images/2129f07473d2d75e5c891914a7a311cb1a457e59.gif)

Use the staff while sneaking to switch its state. In its alternate state, the staff must be charged in order to fire. When released, the staff throws an orb of sunlight that clears a large area of ink.

![A staff charging up energy before firing a magic orb that removes a large area of ink](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jzbQ3nDh/images/f99787b5e8e6802a8eb362d4e1f63b837e541215.gif)

Have fun cleaning!

Special thanks to MoltenCookie62 for the sun staff's texture.
